title: Johor Bahru, Johor — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Johor Bahru is a city in Johor with a population of 1,711,000. Malaysia’s southern gateway city, connected to Singapore by a causeway and a growing economic powerhouse.
